cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.2.3)
set(CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "/Users/taliaangles/Documents/GitHub/OpenFUSIONToolkit/oft_libs/build/SuiteSparse-7.10.1/AMD/../SuiteSparse_config/cmake_modules;/Users/taliaangles/Documents/GitHub/OpenFUSIONToolkit/oft_libs/build/SuiteSparse-7.10.1/AMD/cmake_modules;/Users/taliaangles/Documents/GitHub/OpenFUSIONToolkit/oft_libs/build/SuiteSparse-7.10.1/AMD/../lib/cmake")
set(_CMAKE_CHECK_ENABLED_LANGUAGES "C")
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER "/opt/homebrew/bin/gcc-15")
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER_ID "GNU")
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER_LOADED 1)
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER_VERSION "15.2.0")

project(CheckFortran LANGUAGES Fortran)
file(WRITE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/result.cmake" "set(CMAKE_Fortran_COMPILER \"${CMAKE_Fortran_COMPILER}\")
")
